title: Mailgun domain sending keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant.code:
const smtpPass = process.env.MAILGUN_SMTP_PASSWORD;
const transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({auth: {pass: smtpPass}});
compliant.description: Using environment variable instead of hardcoded value

checks.message: Mailgun domain sending key/password detected. This credential allows sending emails from specific Mailgun domains. Exposing it enables unauthorized email sending, potential spam abuse, and account compromise. Revoke immediately and use secure storage.
